directory (which has each unique NPI that has been assigned to a provider), the Drug Enforcement 
Administration, and SureScripts (a nationwide e-prescribing network). This variable is the primary 
taxonomy code listed for the prescriber in the NPPES directory. 

This variable corresponds with the TAXONOMY_DESC variable, which provides the description of the 
taxonomy code number. There are up to four additional taxonomy groupings for the prescriber in the 
Prescriber Characteristics file
